entry.title: Hey Queers for Palestine: your radicalized brainwashed buddies at Ivy League schools have just been sent THANKS by the leader of Hamas & the Islamic Republic Leader of Iran. Have you realized yet you have been indoctrinated, manipulated & PLAYED in game t

entry.title: Today Purple Hair Girl learns that she doesn’t really care about Palestinian children, she just wants to weaponize their suffering to be hateful towards Israelis & Jews. If she actually CARED about Palestinian children, she’d acknowledge how Palestinian L

entry.title: Today Purple Hair Girl learns about Holocaust Inversion & how intellectually dishonest & hateful it is — to equivocate the war in Gaza that Israel didn’t start which has the lowest civilian to combatant death ratios in modern history — to the systematic,

entry.title: Everyone needs to tell @cynthiaenixon & @rosie to stop being mouthpieces for the Islamist Republic of Iran. They are sharing factually untrue, unverified information from Qatari news agencies that are fueling Anti-American hate. Hamas is a TERRORIST organ
entry.content: Everyone needs to tell @cynthiaenixon & @rosie to stop being mouthpieces for the Islamist Republic of Iran. They are sharing factually untrue, unverified information from Qatari news agencies that are fueling Anti-American hate. Hamas is a TERRORIST organ

entry.title: Lizzo @lizzobeeating whhhhyyyy, please stooooppp. If anyone paid you to do this video return the money & contact a lawyer immediately. Please talk to some cool Israelis & learn more. Also support the hostages at @bringhomenow @bring.hersh.home @bringornow
entry.content: Lizzo @lizzobeeating whhhhyyyy, please stooooppp. If anyone paid you to do this video return the money & contact a lawyer immediately. Please talk to some cool Israelis & learn more. Also support the hostages at @bringhomenow @bring.hersh.home @bringornow

entry.title: Please stop: I’m telling you this as a progressive gay guy. This is a dangerous, unhinged, anti-American movement that is going to get Trump elected & I don’t want that. We will have right-wing extremism & I love democracy. Israel existing is a bipartisan
entry.content: Please stop: I’m telling you this as a progressive gay guy. This is a dangerous, unhinged, anti-American movement that is going to get Trump elected & I don’t want that. We will have right-wing extremism & I love democracy. Israel existing is a bipartisan

entry.title: 1/4 Part Interview with Peace activist Hamza Howidy @hazzah1997 who is one of the first young Gazans speaking out against Hamas. He has written several articles with @newsweek urging protesters worldwide not to glorify or legitimize Hamas & has condemned

entry.title: Today we‘re going to talk about how the IRI is destroying America through ideologues & political polarization & give you some sassy examples — and then I’m gonna use my Power Gay Skills & tell you how to stop them ;)

entry.title: Cute Gays for Peace! Part 2/4 of my interview with Luai Ahmed @justluai In this segment Luai gives a very clear, concise, easy-to-understand overview of how the Houthis came to power in Yemen. The Houthis are a proxy regime of the Islamist republic of Ira
